General.Name: Star Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Star Minerals Limited, explores, develops, and evaluates gold, copper, and base metals properties in Australia. Its flagship project is the Tumblegum South Gold Project located south of Meekatharra in Western Australia. Star Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Leederville, Australia.
